description_long: This is a cylindrical black barrel with subtle brownish-gold edge wear and two horizontal reinforcement bands, one near the top and one near the bottom. The top surface is mostly closed, with a small blue liquid spill visible on one side, suggesting it is partially filled or recently used. One side of the barrel features a stylized gold dragon emblem, while the opposite side displays bold blue text reading 'BLUE SUN' along with Chinese characters. The barrel's surface appears metallic and slightly worn, giving it an industrial, utilitarian look. The overall construction suggests it is designed for storage or transport of liquids or chemicals. Its size and markings indicate it is likely used in urban or industrial environments.
description: A black cylindrical barrel with blue 'BLUE SUN' text, a gold dragon emblem, and a blue liquid spill on top. It has a worn, industrial appearance with metallic reinforcement bands.
description_view_0: The barrel is seen with a blue liquid spill running down from the top edge, and the surface is mostly plain black with visible wear.
description_view_1: This view highlights the gold dragon emblem on the side, with the blue spill just visible at the rim.
description_view_2: The barrel's side shows the edge of the blue 'BLUE SUN' text and Chinese characters, with the blue spill more prominent on the top.
description_view_3: The front displays the full 'BLUE SUN' text and Chinese characters in blue, with the blue spill and top details visible.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: metal reinforcement rings at top and bottom
attribute_labeling_or_markings: BLUE SUN text, Chinese characters, gold dragon emblem
